Text.text: Select an application to get started

MessageStrip.text: Configure your template by selecting fields and marking them as required/optional. Selected fields will appear in the Field Sequence panel on the right.

List.noDataText: Select fields from the left to add them to the sequence

MessageStrip.text: Add SAP validated fields to extend the template. Select the section where the field should be added.
Download an Excel template based on the field sequence above. The template will include all selected fields in the specified order.
Upload a template file (PDF, Excel, or BAI2) and extract fields to map them to the Lockbox API structure. The system will automatically identify fields and suggest mappings.

u:FileUploader.name: templateFile
u:FileUploader.placeholder: Choose PDF, Excel, or BAI2 file...

Button.tooltip: Simulate uploading and extracting an Excel template for testing

MessageStrip.text: Map extracted fields to Lockbox API fields. Auto-populated fields (like Company Code) are pre-filled from system settings.

Table.noDataText: Upload and extract a template to see field mappings

MessageStrip.text: Test your template mapping by simulating a Lockbox API call. This is a temporary test that validates the payload structure without committing to SAP.
{= ${app>/templateBuilder/simulationResult/success} ? '✅ Simulation Successful - Template is valid!' : '❌ Simulation Failed - Check errors above'}

Button.tooltip: View production run history for selected lockbox
